expected_steps: clarify exact support for legacy .xls, multiple sheets, encoding and delimiter
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define conversion contracts for xlsx-to-csv, csv-to-xlsx and unsupported xls behavior
choose dependencies explicitly and isolate legacy xls support behind an adapter
add fixture-based tests for workbook to CSV and CSV to workbook
add negative tests for missing files and unsupported formats
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: xlsx to csv conversion is covered by tests
csv to xlsx conversion is covered by tests
legacy xls limitation or adapter is explicit
all tests run from generated project root
